extraction.description: This screenshot shows UiPath Studio Web in the Agent Builder workspace with the Explorer panel open on the left. The solution named "ServiceNow Incidents Management Solution" is visible, and the agent beneath it is selected with its context menu open. The "Rename" option in the right-click menu is highlighted, indicating the user is about to rename the selected agent.
step_instructions: In the Explorer panel, right-click the selected agent under "ServiceNow Incidents Management Solution".
Click on "Rename" in the context menu.
Enter the new agent name: "ServiceNow Incidents Management Agent".
